name: Chicken in Sour Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown chicken in butter in a skillet.
2. Place the chicken in a casserole dish.
3. Add sour cream and sherry (wine) to the chicken drippings.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients: rosemary, monosodium glutamate, salt, parsley, thyme, chopped green pepper, and pepper to taste.
5. Pour the mixture over the chicken pieces.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
7. Serve with white or wild rice. (This dish can be made ahead of time, refrigerated, and then baked.)
